title: After upgrading to podman 6.0, pods are extremely slow
body:
### Issue Description

After upgrading to latest podman 6.0 all my containers are very slow. I would guess it is connected to disk/FS performance. Operation like clearing cache for symfony app takes so long it even do not finished and I get timeouts.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. run `time bin/console cache:clear` inside symfony container
It will take more than 1 minute and 30 secs, which is longer than on previos podman version (around 16 seconds)

### Describe the results you received

real	1m 36.99s
user	0m 2.73s
sys	0m 9.33s

should be around 15 - to 20 seconds

### Describe the results you expected

symfony cache is cleared and command finished

### Additional information

comments.body:
It would help if you could provide a proper reproducer that anyone can run.

Note that podman 6 switched to libkrun as default provider on macos so that can have different performance characteristics so you should also try to init a VM with `--provider applehv` and see if this works better.

A reviewer has determined we need more information to understand the reported issue.  A comment on what is missing should be provided. Be certain you:

* provide an exact reproducer where possible
* verify you have provided all relevant information - minimum is `podman info`
* answer any follow up questions

If no response to the `needs-info` is provided in 30 days, this issue may be closed by our stale bot.

For more information on reporting issues on this repository, consult our [issue guide](ISSUE.md).
